cover_prompt: A dramatic financial market scene showing global central banks selling US Treasury bonds, with a backdrop of fluctuating bond yield charts and a world map highlighting major economies, conveying systemic financial risk.
infographic_prompts: Infographic illustrating the causes and effects of global central banks' large-scale US Treasury bond sell-off, including data on debt levels, interest rates, and capital flows.
Timeline infographic showing recent US Treasury bond yield changes and central bank holdings adjustments.
